MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-30-2023 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CACILIA FELIX'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE WAS HEARD. STEVEN FINDLEY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 36(A) (WITH A LAST DAY OF 12/28/23). DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED NON-OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF CACILIA FELIX'S VERIFIED COMPLAINT TO QUIET TITLE BY ADVERSE POSSESSION ON 10/25/22. THEREFORE, THE COURT SET THE TRIAL DATE DIRECTLY WITH DEPARTMENT 505 ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2023 AT 9:30AM FOR AN UNCONTESTED, SHORT-CAUSE TRIAL. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. (COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER.) (CMC SET FOR 10/11/23 IN DEPT. 610 IS OFF CALENDAR.) JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Set For Trial On Sep-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 505

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant The Estate of Louella Smith.

Dept. 505; Judge Ronald L Quidachy; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:36 am and concluding at 9:50 am

Plaintiff Cacilia Felix is represented by Steven Finley, Esq.
Defendant The Estate of Louella Smith not appearing.

NANCY KHARSA is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination and testifies.

Plaintiff Cacilia Felix submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Limited Power of Attorney
Exhibit 2: Grant Deed
Exhibit 3: Title Report (2022)
Exhibit 4: Marage Certificate
Exhibit 5: Death Certificate of Enos Felix
Exhibit 6: Death Certificate of Louella Smith
Exhibit 7: Tax Forms
Exhibit 8: Home Owners Insurance
Exhibit 9: PG&E Records
Exhibit 10: Payment Receipts for Improvments and Repairs

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Cacilia Felix as follows:

The simple title of the property located at 839 Peru Avenue is quieted and awarded to Plainitff Cacilia Felix as of the date of the filing of this action.

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits. (D505)
